camera_angles: Worm's Eye View (Ground Level / Extreme Low)
Snorricam / Body-Mount (Chest-level locked to subject, world moves)
Crash Zoom / Smash Zoom (Rapid push into subject)
Tracking Shot / Dolly (Camera follows alongside subject)
Crane / Jib Rising (Camera starts low, rises dramatically)
Drone / Aerial Pull-Back (Revealing scale from above)
Periscope / Extreme Low Forward (Camera nearly on ground, angled up)
Top-Down Flat Lay (Overhead product / artistic overhead)
lighting: 🌅 Golden Hour — Warm, honey-toned magic window 30 min after sunrise/before sunset
🌆 Blue Hour — Cool, moody ambient light just before sunrise or after sunset
☀️ Direct Midday Sun — Harsh overhead light, strong shadows, punchy contrast
🌤️ Overcast / Cloudy — Soft, diffused, even light with no harsh shadows (great for skin)
🌳 Dappled Forest Light — Sunlight filtered through leaves, organic shadow patterns
🌅 Backlit Sunset — Subject silhouetted or rim-lit by setting sun, dreamy haze
🌫️ Fog / Mist — Low visibility, atmospheric softness, ethereal depth
💡 Softbox Studio — Controlled, wrapping light for clean product and portrait work
💍 Ring Light — Even, catchlight-heavy glow perfect for influencer and beauty content
🎭 Rembrandt Lighting — One main light creates dramatic triangle shadow on cheek
🦋 Butterfly / Clamshell — Light above nose creates butterfly shadow, ultra-flattering
🔀 Split Lighting — Hard division of light and shadow down the center of the face
⬜ High-Key Studio — Bright, low-contrast, minimal shadows; clean and commercial
⬛ Low-Key / Moody — Deep shadows dominate; just enough light to define the subject
🌙 Moonlight / Night Scene — Cold blue ambient, dim and mysterious, star-lit sky
🕯️ Candlelight / Firelight — Warm orange flicker, intimate and romantic, low and uneven
🪟 Window Light — Natural side light streaming through glass, soft and directional
💛 Tungsten / Practical Interior — Warm bulb glow, lived-in domestic feel
🌈 Neon / Cyberpunk — Saturated colored light (pink/blue/green) from neon signs
📸 Direct Flash — Harsh direct flash, paparazzi feel, blown-out highlights, raw energy
🎞️ Available Light Only — No added lighting; uses whatever naturally exists in the space
🎪 Colored Gel Lighting — Theatrical colored lights transform mood (purple, red, amber)
☁️ Magic Hour Silhouette — Subject as dark silhouette against vivid sky
🔦 Practical Flashlight / Torch — Single handheld beam, tense and dramatic
🏟️ Stadium / Event Lighting — Big arena lights, dynamic shadows, high energy atmosphere
movie_styles: In the style of 'The Grand Budapest Hotel' (Symmetrical/Pastel)
In the style of 'The Matrix' (Green Tint/Cyberpunk)
In the style of 'Mad Max: Fury Road' (Saturated/Orange/Teal)

fidelity_modes.🎬 High-End Cinematic: ultra high fidelity, professional cinematography, perfect studio lighting, flawless skin retouching, editorial polish, luxury production value, sharp focus, color graded masterfully
fidelity_modes.📱 UGC / Raw: authentic user-generated content style, slightly handheld, natural imperfections, no retouching, raw and real, casual framing, phone camera feel, genuine candid energy, unfiltered, lived-in
fidelity_modes.🌟 Influencer: ring light glow, clean polished background, Instagram-ready, soft natural lighting, effortlessly styled, socially optimized framing, beauty-tuned but approachable
fidelity_modes.🏃 Lifestyle / Action: candid motion energy, authentic real-life moments, slight motion blur, dynamic angles, documentary feel, unposed and genuine, natural environment
fidelity_modes.🎞️ Editorial / Fashion: fashion editorial precision, dramatic studio shadows, avant-garde composition, high contrast, magazine-quality retouching, artistic direction, high concept
